e88-raw.source: Corrected p50k_base E88 raw-write anchor from old best geometry; n_heads adjusted from 362 to 381 to target 1300M.

e88-linear.source: Corrected p50k_base E88 linear-state ablation anchor using matched E88 geometry; n_heads adjusted from 348 to 363 to target 1300M.

fla-gdn.source: Corrected p50k_base FLA-GDN anchor from current long racer geometry, depth adjusted from 21 to 20 after tokenizer-aware accounting.

m2rnn.source: Corrected p50k_base M2RNN anchor from current XMA long racer geometry.
